ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ip_blocks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address block */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of IP address block (e.g., IP4Block, IP4Network) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the IP address block */,
  "cidr" TEXT /* CIDR notation for the IP address block */,
  "allow_duplicate_host" INTEGER /* Flag to allow duplicate hosts */,
  "inherit_allow_duplicate_host" INTEGER /* Flag to inherit allow duplicate hosts from parent */,
  "ping_before_assign" INTEGER /* Flag to ping before assigning IP address */,
  "inherit_ping_before_assign" INTEGER /* Flag to inherit ping before assign from parent */,
  "location_inherited" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if location is inherited */,
  "inherit_default_domains" INTEGER /* Flag to inherit default domains from parent */,
  "default_view" INTEGER /* ID of the default view */,
  "inherit_default_view" INTEGER /* Flag to inherit default view from parent */,
  "inherit_dns_restrictions" INTEGER /* Flag to inherit DNS restrictions from parent */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the IP block */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IP block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IP block was last updated */,
  "parent_block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent IP block for hierarchical management */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the IP block is active */,
  "ip_version" TEXT /* Version of the IP address (IPv4 or IPv6) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_blocks_parent_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_block_id") REFERENCES ip_blocks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_block_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address block type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the IP address block type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IP address block type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address block it belongs to */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address */,
  "allocated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the IP address is allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the IP address was allocated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the IP address */,
  "subnet_mask" TEXT /* Subnet mask for the IP address */,
  "gateway" TEXT /* Gateway for the IP address */,
  "dns_servers" TEXT /* DNS servers for the IP address */,
  "lease_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for the IP lease */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IP address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IP address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_addresses_ip_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_block_id") REFERENCES ip_blocks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "parent_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent location */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_parent_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default view */,
  "view_name" TEXT /* Name of the default view */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the default view */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the default view was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the default view was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dns_restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DNS restriction */,
  "restriction_name" TEXT /* Name of the DNS restriction */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the DNS restriction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the DNS restriction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the DNS restriction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_block_locations" (
  "ip_block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address block */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_block_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_address_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address */,
  "allocated_to" TEXT /* Entity the IP address is allocated to */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the IP address was allocated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the allocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_address_allocations_ip_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_address_allocations_allocated_to FOREIGN KEY ("allocated_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., allocation, deallocation) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "ip_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address affected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who triggered the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client that triggered the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_ip_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_address_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dns_restriction_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "ip_block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address block */,
  "dns_restriction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DNS restriction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dns_restriction_configs_ip_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_block_id") REFERENCES ip_blocks ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dns_restriction_configs_dns_restriction_id FOREIGN KEY ("dns_restriction_id") REFERENCES dns_restrictions ("restriction_id")
)
